parties.name: LY, CHRISTINE, AKA CHRISTINE LY TRAN

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-26-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Philip Kilduff, Esq. 415-673-0368 Specially appearing for Plaintiff Berry Company.
Christine Ly 415-753-3091 Defendant in Pro Per.
Mandarin Interpreter Rebecca Chau is present.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Defendant informs the Court re: the restaurant and her property. Plaintiff argues property is not listed on her papers. Defedant argues the debt amount. 10:03 am. Parties are ordered to meet and confer re: debt amount and new address of Plaintiff. 10:16. After meet and confer, Plainitff reports an impasse. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF CHRISTINE LY is taken under submission.*(as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/RBU)

*after the hearing, the Court signs an Order Denying the Judgment Creditor's claim of Exemption. (see scanned order for details)*

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Apr-24-2008 Discharged

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Continued To Feb-29-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
